ground_truth.title: Machine Learning for Systemic Risk Monitoring in Financial Networks
ground_truth.abstract: We apply graph convolutional networks to interbank exposure networks to predict systemic stress events, evaluating model performance against CoVaR and SRISK benchmarks using data from 48 countries.
